analyst_observations.observation: Skill-based approach is significantly faster and uses fewer tokens
analyst_observations.details: Mean time reduced by 42% (17.3s → 10.0s), tokens reduced by 22% (7066 → 5500)

analyst_observations.observation: Both approaches achieved 100% pass rate on all evals
analyst_observations.details: Skill and baseline both successfully completed all extraction tasks

analyst_observations.observation: Skill approach demonstrated better semantic understanding
analyst_observations.details: For image extraction, skill correctly identified no embedded images exist. Baseline rendered entire page as image, which is technically valid but different interpretation of 'extract images'

analyst_observations.observation: Skill approach shows more consistent tool selection
analyst_observations.details: Skill consistently used poppler-utils CLI tools; baseline used different Python libraries for each task (pdfplumber, PyPDF2, PyMuPDF)
